case_title: ARGENTUM INTERNATIONAL INC. VS COMMUNITY CONSULTING AND DEVELOPMENT et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,870.00 FILED BY ARGENTUM INTERNATIONAL INC. AS TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY CONSULTING AND DEVELOPMENT STEWART, COURTLAND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-31-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
